IRCC Express Entry policy update — official notice (fixture page for offline tests).

Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada announced significant changes to the Express Entry system. Invitations to apply under the Federal Skilled Worker category will be paused starting September 2026. The department also confirmed that Comprehensive Ranking System cutoff scores rose by more than 60 points over the last two draws.

Applicants who already received an invitation are not affected by the pause. New category-based selection rounds will prioritize healthcare and trades occupations only.

Analysts note that the changes amount to a substantial tightening of federal skilled immigration pathways for the coming year.
